name: gralkor-monorepo
description: Gralkor monorepo — Python server (server/) + Elixir adapter (ex/) + TypeScript adapter (ts/). This root is not published; only the sub-packages are.

scripts.test:unit: (cd server && uv run pytest --ignore=tests/test_integration.py) && (cd ex && mix test.unit) && (cd ts && pnpm test)
scripts.test:int: (cd server && uv run pytest tests/test_integration.py) && (cd ex && mix test.integration)
scripts.test:all: pnpm run test:unit && pnpm run test:int && pnpm run test:fun
